title: 2pcs 10 Cavity Palm Tree Silicone Mold Cake Mould Chocolate Candy Cupcake Mould Jelly Baking Mould Mold Ice Cube Tray
features: High-quality silicone material, tasteless, non-toxic, anti-dust, durable, impermeable, bake flexible.
Use for candy molds, chocolate molds, cake molds, ice cube tray, crayon mold and jelly mold or as a cake topper, cake decorating.
Very easy to clean and save time, only wash with soap and water, rinse, shake water and let air dry.
Can be used in the oven, microwave, etc.
Material: Food-grade silicone. Mold Size: 8.3 x 4.3 x 0.9 inch. Cavity Size: 1.8 x 1.8 x 0.8 inch.
description: This item is well made of food- grade silicone for durable and long-lasting use. With 10 cavities each tray, it can be used in the both oven and microwave. Silicone cake moulds won't crack or break like stiff plastic molds or trays, which is easy to fill, to use and to clean.With resuable design, it is really a wonderful chocolate mold kit for choice.
